---
id: DM_R042
title: "Makefile Command Reference"
subtitle: "Quick reference for Pipeline execution commands"
category: "Data Management"
type: "Rule"
status: "Active"
version: "1.0"
created: "2025-12-26"
last_updated: "2025-12-26"
related_principles: [MP140, MP141, MP142, SO_P016]
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: false
---

## Statement

All Pipeline operations MUST be executed via Makefile commands from the `scripts/update_scripts/` directory. This ensures consistent execution, proper dependency resolution, and adherence to the three-layer configuration architecture.

## Working Directory

```bash
cd /path/to/MAMBA/scripts/update_scripts/
```

All `make` commands must be run from this directory. The Makefile will NOT work from other locations.

## Quick Start

```bash
# First-time setup
make config-full        # Merge configs and validate

# Check what will run
make run-dry           # Dry run (no execution)

# Execute pipeline
make run               # Run all platforms
make run PLATFORM=cbz  # Run specific platform
```

## Command Reference

### Execution Commands

| Command | Description | Example |
|---------|-------------|---------|
| `make run` | Execute full pipeline (all enabled platforms) | `make run` |
| `make run PLATFORM=cbz` | Execute specific platform only | `make run PLATFORM=eby` |
| `make run TARGET=cbz_D04_02` | Execute specific target with its dependencies | `make run TARGET=amz_D01_03` |
| `make run LAYER=etl` | Execute ETL layer only | `make run LAYER=drv` |
| `make run-dry` | Dry run - show what would execute | `make run-dry` |

### Platform Shortcuts

| Command | Equivalent |
|---------|------------|
| `make run-cbz` | `make run PLATFORM=cbz` |
| `make run-eby` | `make run PLATFORM=eby` |
| `make run-amz` | `make run PLATFORM=amz` |
| `make run-all-platforms` | `make run PLATFORM=all` |

### Layer Shortcuts

| Command | Equivalent |
|---------|------------|
| `make run-etl` | `make run LAYER=etl` |
| `make run-drv` | `make run LAYER=drv` |

### Status and Monitoring Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `make status` | Check pipeline progress and target states |
| `make vis` | Open dependency DAG visualization in browser |
| `make logs` | List recent log files (last 10) |

### Configuration Commands

| Command | Description | When to Use |
|---------|-------------|-------------|
| `make config-validate` | Validate `_targets_config.yaml` | After manual edits |
| `make config-merge` | Merge base + company configs | After modifying `app_config.yaml` |
| `make config-scan` | Scan ETL/DRV directories for scripts | After adding new scripts |
| `make config-full` | Full config: merge + scan + validate | First-time setup or major changes |

### Maintenance Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `make clean` | Destroy targets cache and rebuild |
| `make clean-logs` | Remove log files older than 30 days |

### Scheduling Commands (macOS launchd)

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `make schedule` | Set up weekly execution (Sunday 2:00 AM) |
| `make schedule-status` | Check if scheduled job is active |
| `make unschedule` | Disable scheduled execution |
| `make schedule-logs` | View scheduled job logs |

## Parameters

| Parameter | Valid Values | Default | Description |
|-----------|-------------|---------|-------------|
| `PLATFORM` | `cbz`, `eby`, `amz`, `all` | `all` | Target platform to execute |
| `LAYER` | `etl`, `drv`, `both` | `both` | Pipeline layer to execute |
| `TARGET` | Any valid target name | (empty) | Specific target with dependencies |

### Parameter Combinations

```bash
# Execute only ETL for Cyberbiz
make run PLATFORM=cbz LAYER=etl

# Execute specific DRV target
make run TARGET=cbz_D04_02

# Dry run for eBay DRV layer
make run-dry PLATFORM=eby LAYER=drv
```

## Configuration Workflow

Following the three-layer configuration architecture (SO_P016):

```
Layer 1 (Universal)    global_scripts/templates/_targets_config.base.yaml
        ↓                      (shared via subrepo)
Layer 2 (Company)      app_config.yaml > pipeline: section
        ↓                      (company-specific overrides)
Layer 3 (Generated)    _targets_config.yaml
                              (final merged config)
```

### Recommended Workflow

```bash
# 1. After modifying app_config.yaml
make config-merge

# 2. After adding new ETL/DRV scripts
make config-scan

# 3. Full refresh (combines all steps)
make config-full

# 4. Validate before execution
make config-validate

# 5. Preview execution plan
make run-dry

# 6. Execute
make run
```

## Troubleshooting

### Common Issues

| Issue | Cause | Solution |
|-------|-------|----------|
| "No targets to run" | Config not generated | Run `make config-full` |
| "Config file not found" | Missing `_targets_config.yaml` | Run `make config-merge` |
| "Target not found" | Invalid target name | Check `make status` for valid names |
| "Permission denied" | File permission issues | Check R/W permissions on data directories |
| "Database locked" | Concurrent access | Close other R sessions or DuckDB connections |
| "Package not found" | Missing R package | Install via `install.packages()` |

### Debugging Steps

1. **Check configuration**:
   ```bash
   make config-validate
   ```

2. **View current state**:
   ```bash
   make status
   ```

3. **Visualize dependencies**:
   ```bash
   make vis
   ```

4. **Check logs**:
   ```bash
   make logs
   tail -f logs/run_*.log
   ```

5. **Clean rebuild**:
   ```bash
   make clean
   make config-full
   make run
   ```

## Log Files

Logs are stored in `scripts/update_scripts/logs/`:

```
logs/
├── run_20251226_140532.log   # Execution logs
├── run_20251226_093015.log
└── ...
```

Format: `run_YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS.log`

## Related Principles

| Principle | Topic |
|-----------|-------|
| MP140 | Pipeline Orchestration - Declarative dependency markers |
| MP141 | Scheduled Execution Pattern - Manual + scheduled modes |
| MP142 | Configuration-Driven Pipeline - Three-layer YAML config |
| SO_P016 | Configuration Scope Hierarchy - Universal/Company/Application |
| MP064 | ETL-Derivation Separation |
| MP107 | ETL Pipeline Independence |
| MP108 | ETL Phase Sequence |

## Implementation Notes

The Makefile wraps the `{targets}` R package for pipeline orchestration. Key files:

- `_targets.R` - Main pipeline definition
- `ETL/_targets_etl.R` - ETL layer targets
- `DRV/_targets_drv.R` - DRV layer targets
- `_targets_config.yaml` - Generated configuration

Each script must include dependency markers (per MP140):

```r
#####
# CONSUMES: df_cbz_sales_transformed
# PRODUCES: df_cbz_poisson_analysis_all
# DEPENDS_ON_ETL: cbz_ETL_sales_2TR
# DEPENDS_ON_DRV: cbz_D04_01
#####
```
